name: Evernote API
description: Evernote uses a Thrift-based EDAM (Evernote Data Access and Management) protocol accessed over HTTPS. The NoteStore service provides note, notebook, tag, and search operations. The UserStore service provides user and authentication operations. All calls are POST requests with Thrift-encoded bodies to the respective service endpoint.
